action.reasoning: Observation: Training stopped very early (~50-60 rounds) with valid l2=0.996 — essentially flat. This is likely because CSRankNorm scales labels to a tight rank-based range with very small variance, so MSE doesn't decrease much numerically but model is still learning. However the early stopping tolerance is too tight. Models trained, predict.py is solid (IC 0.0435 baseline). Analysis: I should evaluate this 3-seed ensemble first before more changes — early stopping fired late enough that meaningful learning happened. Let me submit eval to see if ensembling helps. Decision: submit eval.
